title: Try triggering an image rebuild
body: https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4601027732701184 shows it using go 1.24.3, but https://quay.io/repository/coreos-assembler/fcos-buildroot/manifest/sha256:55d7510ee1b15ae4c8c503efaa463c58ce0c3d484ab7ec4fe8b211ca5a5aacf9?tab=packages shows 1.25.4 already; are we caching an older build?

comments.body: It triggers a ~one-time rebuild of the image Cirrus uses, to benefit from an updated base image.
